basic.name: Citizen

professional.name: Veteran

payment.title: Multiple Ways For Massive Gains

payment.activation_notice_desc: Once payment verification is complete, the account will be activated within 24 hours at most. The team will process it as soon as possible.

license.dialog_desc: Check the active plan, or drop a license code below to activate it.
license.status_free: No license active yet, free features only for now.

license.status_trial_other: Trial's live, {{count}} days left, make it count.
license.status_premium: Premium's active for life. No expiry date, ever.

faq.title: Curious? We Got Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything needed to kickstart the journey and stop the guesswork.

questions.a: RabaLaba is a professional financial research terminal for multi asset analysis, featuring rule based signals and real time data.

questions.q: Is the terminal free to use?
questions.a: RabaLaba offers the '$t(pricing.plans.basic.name)' tier is free for basic research. For advanced features, the '$t(pricing.plans.professional.name)' and '$t(pricing.plans.ultimate.name)' tier for professional.
We source our data from institutional grade providers like Yahoo Finance and other trusted giants. It is real time and credible.

questions.q: Do I need to sign up for an account?
questions.a: No tedious sign ups here. Just open the terminal and start hunting for gains immediately. Time is money.

hero.subtitle: The top tier class of market analysis for Indonesia Stocks, US Stocks, Crypto, Commodities, and Forex. Accurate signals, zero noise, infinite money glitch.

features.title: Main Features
features.subtitle: The Ultimate Kit to
features.description: High impact research terminal built for those who value data over FOMO.

multi_asset.title: Multi Asset Research
multi_asset.description: Monitor Indonesia stocks, US stocks, crypto, commodities, and forex in one screen. Instant execution.

sentiment.title: Long/Short Sentiment
sentiment.description: Analyze rule based buy and sell signals with transparent signal strength scores, decision support not predictions. Let the data speak for itself.

trading_plan.title: Trading Plan Setup
trading_plan.description: Get auto generated entry, stop loss, and take profit levels with precision. Master plan and execute trades with ease.

volume.title: Volume Analysis
volume.description: Detect whale movements through significant spikes in trading volume. Confirm market trends with real time data not just vibes.

calendar.title: Economic Calendar
calendar.description: Track major global economic events that trigger market volatility. Stay updated on CPI, FOMC, and high impact news to keep edge.

fear_greed.title: Fear & Greed Monitor
fear_greed.description: Track market psychology with our Fear & Greed Index. Buy when others are fearful, and sell when they get greedy.

market.search_placeholder: Filter assets by name or symbol...
market.favorite_empty_desc: Add assets using the button up top, or star assets in other categories.
market.data_unavailable: Market data is taking a break
market.data_unavailable_desc: The API isn't responding right now. A quick connection check should sort it out.

terminal.title: Research Terminal
terminal.subtitle: Multi asset analysis with real time data & accurate signals
terminal.access_dialog_desc: This feature is for premium members only. Drop the access code below to unlock it.
terminal.access_dialog_invalid_code: Invalid access code! Please try again.
terminal.access_dialog_success: Access granted! Premium features are unlocked forever.
terminal.access_config_missing: Premium access is currently unavailable. Please contact support.
terminal.access_error_decryption: Premium access verification failed. Please enter the access code again.
terminal.access_trial_success: Access granted! Premium features are now unlocked.
terminal.access_trial_expired: The trial is ended. Hit up support for full access.

calendar.title: Economic Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Worldwide weekly schedule of market moving economic events
calendar.no_events: No events match the current filters right now
calendar.no_events_desc: Try adjusting the filters or pick another date.
calendar.select_event: Select an event to view details

table.suppressed_hint: Strong directional lean held to NEUTRAL by the no-trade filter (choppy / counter-trend market).

footer.description: Professional financial research terminal for multi asset analysis. Rule based signals with institutional grade data.

dialog.not_enough_data: Not enough data to compute signal. Try a different asset.
dialog.loading: Loading chart data for signal computation...
dialog.no_setup: No actionable trade setup right now, signal is neutral.
dialog.suppressed_note: A strong {{tier}}-tier directional lean was held to NEUTRAL by the no-trade filter ({{reason}}). The conviction is real, but conditions don't favor entering yet.
dialog.bt_note: Walk forward simulation on past candles only. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
dialog.bt_insufficient: Not enough price history to run a backtest yet.
dialog.sm_unavailable_title: Smart money data is acting up
dialog.sm_unavailable_desc: Binance derivatives data didn't load, likely because the exchange is blocked on this network. Positioning gets skipped from this signal. Switching to a VPN or another DNS usually sorts it out.
dialog.share_failed_signal: Could not generate the signal image
dialog.share_failed_position: Could not generate the position image

disclaimer.title: Know The Risks
disclaimer.description: The RabaLaba Research Terminal provides high octane intel, but please note these essential rules:
points: Not financial advice, just pure data and research. Always do due diligence.
The pilot is in control, the terminal is the radar. All trading decisions and risks belong to the user alone.
Use cold capital only. Never trade with essential funds like rent or daily needs.
Market volatility is real. Stay disciplined and keep emotions in check.
disclaimer.confirm: I have read and understood the risk disclosure
disclaimer.toast_success: System locked in. Welcome to the Command Center!

journal.no_open: Follow a signal on the Market tab to start tracking!
journal.no_history: Closed positions will show up right here.
journal.clear_confirm: Delete all trade history? This cannot be undone.
journal.empty_dashboard: Follow and close trades to see the performance here.
journal.followed_toast_desc: New open position is now being tracked. Want to see the details?
journal.delete_confirm_desc: Delete the {{symbol}} trade record? This action cannot be undone.
journal.close_confirm_desc: Want to manually close {{symbol}} position at the current price?

not_found.title: Lost Forever
not_found.description: This page vanished without a trace. Moved or never existed. Let's just head back.

error_boundary.title: Something Broke
error_boundary.description: No worries, nothing major here. A quick reload usually gets things back to normal.
